prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 1. Business". The next section is "Item 1A. Risk Factors".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 1" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 1A" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 1 continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
our website is provided for convenience and the content of our website is not deemed to be incorporated by reference in this report filed with the
SEC. Additionally, the SEC maintains an internet site through which our reports, proxy and information statements and our other SEC filings can be
located; the address of that site is http://www.sec.gov.
